# We build quantum applications
##### Meet the team that helps you enter the Quantum age
[All](https://www.qcware.com/team#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-0)[Board](https://www.qcware.com/team#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-1)[Leadership](https://www.qcware.com/team#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-2)
![Matt Johnson](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/61c22f7d26be0da0693bf79a_2021-profile-mjohnson.avif)
#### Matt Johnson
###### Co-Founder & CEO
##### MBA (UPenn, Wharton) BS (US Air Force Academy)
Matt leads QC Ware’s business and he serves on the QED-C governing board. Matt was a captain in the Air Force and subsequently worked in finance, becoming a managing director in private equity at Apollo Management. Matt swam the English Channel and remains an avid but mediocre swimmer.
[Publications ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/team)
![KJ Sham](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/61c2303515bc159a23c97aee_2021-profile-ksham.avif)
#### KJ Sham
###### Co-Founder & COO
##### MBA, PhD (Electrical Engineering, University of Minnesota), M.Eng (EECS, MIT)
KJ oversees the day-to-day operations and manages all three business units (Quantum Services, Q2B, and Promethium), while driving cross-team alignment to execute strategic initiatives. Previously co-founded and exited multiple startups, leading teams from concept to commercialization in medical devices and high-tech consumer products.
[Publications ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/team)
![John Hynes](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/6296b50060082d34133e9912_Hynes.avif)
#### John Hynes
###### President and CFO
##### MBA (Finance, The Wharton School), BA (Economics, Dartmouth College) 
John is responsible for overseeing all finance functions, including fundraising, treasury, and strategy. 
[Publications ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/team)
![Michael McGlone](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/6932516ae6df9f6432d43830_McGlone_Headshot_4.22.2024_70%25.jpg)
#### Michael McGlone
###### Board Member
##### MBA (International Banking & Finance), BBA (Accounting, Minor in Communications)
Michael is a Board Member at QC Ware and a Director at Citi Ventures with more than 18 years of venture investing experience at Citi. He has served on over 25 boards and led direct and fund investments across fintech and enterprise software, including contributions to the Tradeweb and Markit IPOs. Prior to Citi, he held roles at JPMorgan and Morgan Stanley and has extensive experience supporting founders on M&A, strategic planning, and partnerships. Based in New York, Michael enjoys swimming, golf, and racquet sports.
[Publications ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/team)

### Advisors
![Daniel Cheney ](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/65c46a31f14a7f0554fcd996_cheney-picture4.avif)
#### Daniel Cheney 
###### Advisor
Dan has over 35 years experience in experimental and computational drug discover, first with Rhone-Poulenc Rorer (now Sanofi) and beginning in 1998, with Bristol Myers Squibb. Among his areas of expertise are molecular structure and recognition, and physics-based approaches to predictive molecular design. 
[Publications ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&tzom=300&user=wnjdmaQAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate)
![Peter McMahon](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/62a39634652380217dc8e7f4_profile-pmcmahon.avif)
#### Peter McMahon
###### Advisor
Peter is an Advisor to QC Ware, focusing on the evolving quantum hardware landscape and evaluating opportunities for quantum advantage. He is an Associate Professor at Cornell University, where he leads a research group exploring unconventional computing across classical and quantum systems.
[Publications ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](http://mcmahon.aep.cornell.edu/)
![Adam Bouland](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/6075b7eba2335177ccd0dbe9_x.avif)
#### Adam Bouland
###### Advisor
Adam is an Advisor for Quantum Algorithms at QC Ware, providing guidance and expertise to the quantum algorithms team. He is an Assistant Professor of Computer Science at Stanford University, where his research focuses on quantum computing theory.
[Publications ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=61uf9p0AAAAJ&hl=en)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/6075b7eba233516494d0dbee_qc-ware-logo-light-horizontal.avif)
